segments.text: 夫未戰而廟算勝者，得算多也；未戰而廟算不勝者，得算少也。
多算勝，少算不勝，而況無算乎！吾以此觀之，勝負見矣。

draftRationale.segmentation: Split into two segments: (1) the first long sentence with two parallel clauses about pre-battle calculation outcomes, and (2) the second and third sentences combined—both are short and together form a natural conclusion about how more calculation leads to victory and fewer calculations lead to defeat.
